• Household stress builds — student loan defaults, long-term unemployment, and weak household formation signal softer consumer demand.
• Japan launches $2.3T growth plan — massive public-private push targets AI, chips, and space.
• South Korea market structure amplifies swings — forced flows and automated rebalancing may magnify volatility.

🌍 Geopolitical
• Rubio heads to the Gulf — planned Middle East trip includes Kuwait, UAE, Bahrain, with a GCC ministerial in Bahrain.
• Israel/Iran backchannel remains fragile — Pakistan mediates, Khamenei gives conditional backing, and both sides warn of contingencies.

🪙 Crypto & DeFi

• South Korea retail rushes into SpaceX — record first-day buying underscores speculative appetite across high-beta assets.

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy

🏢 Corporate

• Starbucks and Porsche cut costs — more restructuring and production restraint show consumer/cyclical caution.
